recommendations.title: Smokey and the Bandit II
recommendations.overview: The Bandit goes on another cross-country run, transporting an elephant from Florida to Texas. And, once again, Sheriff Buford T. Justice is on his tail.

recommendations.title: The Devil's Rejects
recommendations.overview: The murderous, backwoods Firefly family take to the road to escape the vengeful Sheriff Wydell, who is not afraid of being as ruthless as his target.

recommendations.title: The Invisible
recommendations.overview: After an attack leaves him in limbo -- invisible to the living and also near death -- a teenager discovers the only person who might be able help him is his attacker.

recommendations.title: The House at the End of Time
recommendations.overview: The story of Dulce, a mother who has encounters with apparitions inside her old house. She must decipher a mystery that could trigger a prophecy: the death of her family.

recommendations.title: The Adventures of Robin Hood
recommendations.overview: Robin Hood fights nobly for justice against the evil Sir Guy of Gisbourne while striving to win the hand of the beautiful Maid Marian.

recommendations.title: The Unborn
recommendations.overview: A young woman fights the spirit that is slowly taking possession of her.

recommendations.title: The Sheriff and the Satellite Kid
recommendations.overview: The town of Newnan are seeing little green men everywhere. The military have arrived and are on the lookout for UFOs. Everyone's high strung and Sheriff Hall (Bud Spencer) is left to deal with the aftermaths of the hysteria. On his way home from patr

recommendations.title: Major League II
recommendations.overview: After losing in the ALCS the year before, the Cleveland Indians are determined to make it into the World Series this time! However, they first have to contend with Rachel Phelps again when she buys back the team.

recommendations.title: Baise-moi
recommendations.overview: Nadine and Manu are two mad women, as tidy as can be, almost perfectionists. They have several things in common: extreme sex, drugs, beer and the trigger. They find the solution to their problems with guns and beware to those who dare to get in their

recommendations.title: King Ralph
recommendations.overview: As the only relative in line to ascend the Royal throne, a down-on-his-luck American slob must learn the ways of the English.
